CREATE TABLE xml_test (id UInt32, xml_string String);
SELECT decodeXMLComponent(xml_string) FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT decodeXMLComponent(xml_string) FROM xml_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT decodeXMLComponent(xml_string) FROM xml_test WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, decodeXMLComponent(xml_string) AS decoded_string FROM xml_test ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE xml_test_2 (id UInt32, xml_string String, additional_info String);
INSERT INTO xml_test_2 SELECT id, xml_string, '"additional info for ID ' || toString(id) || '"' FROM xml_test;
SELECT t1.id, decodeXMLComponent(t1.xml_string), decodeXMLComponent(t2.additional_info) FROM xml_test t1 JOIN xml_test_2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
